1ab5df16-3a71-4e27-9146-e0795e1fc7f1.name: Custom Effect
1ab5df16-3a71-4e27-9146-e0795e1fc7f1.fragmentShader: uniform sampler2D uPreviousFrame;uniform vec2 uMouse;uniform float uTime;uniform float uDeltaTime;void mainImage(const in vec4 inputColor, const in vec2 uv, out vec4 outputColor) {  float dist = distance(uv, uMouse);  float ripple = sin(dist * 20.0 - uTime * 5.0) * 0.006;  float strength = smoothstep(0.2, 0.0, dist);  vec2 offset = normalize(uv - uMouse) * ripple * strength;  vec4 colorR = texture2D(uPreviousFrame, uv + offset + vec2(0.005, 0.0) * strength);  vec4 colorG = texture2D(uPreviousFrame, uv + offset);  vec4 colorB = texture2D(uPreviousFrame, uv + offset - vec2(0.005, 0.0) * strength);  outputColor = vec4(colorR.r, colorG.g, colorB.b, 1.0);}

115f7538-8603-4884-a1b6-4fcc1b85acc6.name: Custom Effect
115f7538-8603-4884-a1b6-4fcc1b85acc6.fragmentShader: void mainImage(const in vec4 inputColor, const in vec2 uv, out vec4 outputColor) { outputColor = inputColor; }

12759cff-7db6-4202-93b8-ba977231e92c.name: Custom Effect
12759cff-7db6-4202-93b8-ba977231e92c.fragmentShader: void mainImage(const in vec4 inputColor, const in vec2 uv, out vec4 outputColor) { outputColor = inputColor; }
